name: miles-jira-event-router
description: Receives Jira automation events and routes notifications to Slack. Supports 6 event types: req_sent_to_dev (notifies #4dt-product-technology-delivery + auto-assigns PM), req_promoted_to_done (notifies area channel), story_in_refinement / story_to_do / story_in_progress / story_to_done (notifies area channel and/or #req-product-notifications). Auto-assignment logic balances load between Valentin Vila and Matias Sragowicz, with Legal & Compliance hardcoded to Valentin and Operations hardcoded to Matias.
